scripts.deploy:web: cd src/apps/web && npm ci --workspaces=false && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:web:preview: cd src/apps/web && npm ci --workspaces=false && npm run deploy
scripts.db:migrate:server:local: cd src/apps/web && npm ci --workspaces=false && npm run db:migrate:local
scripts.db:migrate:server:remote: cd src/apps/web && npm ci --workspaces=false && npm run db:migrate:remote
